description: Cause matrix 05: high_wait_congestion tested on tunnel ratio 50% with 10 agents.
hypothesis: Longer corridors should increase abstraction repair length; more agents per corridor node should increase waits and conflict handling.
name: matrix_c05_r50_w140_h25_a10_s01
target_failure_hypothesis: Many agents in a long single-lane tunnel should increase stay actions and wait ratio.
